title: Skibidi Player Toilet
description: For every 21 zombies, a skibidi toilet is generated with the head of the player closest to its spawn, these are much stronger and have much more life than a zombie
body: Every 21 zombies, a Skibidi Toilet spawns with the head of the nearest player, creating a terrifying and unpredictable foe. In the Nether, some have merged with piglins, taking on a pig-like form and becoming even more fearsome.
